---
title: "test_muninn_memory_idempotency_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_muninn_memory_idempotency_empire.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.10
style_score: 3.52
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.91
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn_memory_idempotency_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMuninnMemoryIdempotency, mock_muninn, test_distill_knowledge_creates_directives. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMuninnMemoryIdempotency, mock_muninn, test_distill_knowledge_creates_directives. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [json](file://json)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `TestMuninnMemoryIdempotency`
- `mock_muninn`
- `test_distill_knowledge_creates_directives`
